description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Integration Tests that runs on merge groups and pull requests. The workflow consists of four jobs: build, formatting-check, cppcheck, and hw_testing. The build job compiles firmware using PlatformIO on an ubuntu-latest environment, checks out the code, and uploads the firmware artifact. The formatting-check job runs a clang-format style check on multiple paths in the repository. The cppcheck job runs a PlatformIO check for defects. The hw_testing job performs hardware testing on a self-hosted environment with a specific USB port.
